themes.description: Users are criticizing Groww for charging high brokerage fees, which they feel are excessively high and eat into their profits.
themes.business_impact: High customer dissatisfaction and potential loss of users due to perceived unfair pricing, which could negatively impact revenue and business growth.
themes.root_cause_hypothesis: Groww's pricing strategy and model are viewed as unfavorable by users, leading to a perception of excessive brokerage costs.
themes.action_plan: • Reassess and potentially adjust pricing strategy to make it more customer-friendly. Provide clear, transparent fee disclosure to avoid misunderstandings.

themes.name: [Negative] Poor App Quality
themes.description: Users reported frequent bugs, crashes, and overall poor app quality, which led to a frustrating experience.
themes.business_impact: The high number of 1-star ratings may indicate a significant loss of user trust and long-term damage to the app's reputation.
themes.root_cause_hypothesis: Insufficient pre-launch testing and quality assurance processes may be contributing to the poor app quality.
themes.action_plan: • Re-establish and execute comprehensive pre-launch testing, improve QA processes, and prioritize bug fixing.
